Tests the behavior of Math.pow with Infinity as the base and 3 as the exponent.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the behavior of the `Math.pow` function when raising `Infinity` to the power of 3. The assertion verifies that the result is `Infinity`, which is consistent with mathematical rules for exponentiation involving infinity. This test is likely part of a broader test suite to ensure the correct functionality of mathematical operations in a JavaScript environment. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on validating the behavior of a single mathematical operation.
